JavaScript tests for Math functions including abs, acos, asin, atan, atan2, ceil, cos, exp, floor, log, max, min, pow, round, sin, sqrt, and tan with various inputs.

- **[15.08.02.09](15.08.02.09/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for `Math.floor` behavior with various inputs including `NaN`, zero, infinity, and specific values.

- **[15.08.02.12](15.08.02.12/README.md)**: Tests for the `Math.min` function in JavaScript, covering various argument scenarios and properties.
- **[15.08.02.13](15.08.02.13/README.md)**: JavaScript Math.pow function test cases with various numeric and non-numeric inputs.
- **[15.08.02.15](15.08.02.15/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for `Math.round` function with various inputs including `NaN`, zero, infinity, and decimals.
- **[15.08.02.16](15.08.02.16/README.md)**: Tests for the Math.sin function with various inputs including NaN, zero, and infinity.
